parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page number your are on.

parameters.name: SizePage
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: StateSubscription
parameters.description: Filter ressource by subscription status.

schema.description:
Granular technical state of a subscription. Each value maps to a functional Status.

| Value | Status | Description |
|---|---|---|
| DraftCustomer | Draft | Draft initiated by the customer without completing signup. |
| DraftAgent | Draft | Draft created by an agent. |
| DraftDelayedStart | Draft | Subscription with a scheduled start date. |
| DraftDelayedUpgrade | Draft | Subscription replacing an active one on its next term. |
| ActiveRunning | Active | Currently operational. |
| ActiveDelayedUpgrade | Active | Being replaced by a new subscription at next renewal. |
| ActiveDelayedTermination | Active | Will terminate at next renewal. |
| ActiveDelayedSuspension | Active | Will be suspended at next renewal. |
| SuspendedAgent | Suspended | Suspended by an agent. |
| SuspendedNoPaymentInfo | Suspended | Suspended automatically — payment information missing. |
| SuspendedPaymentDue | Suspended | Suspended automatically — too many unpaid invoices. |
| EndedComplete | Ended | Time-limited subscription that ran its full course. |
| EndedUpgrade | Ended | Terminated after a plan change. |
| EndedTerminated | Ended | Explicitly terminated. |
| Deleted | Deleted | Subscription in deletion process. |
schema.title: SubscriptionStatus

schema.description:
Allow to get detailed subresources about subscription.

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| all | Add all subressources.|
| AddressBilling | Add billing address related to customer who paid the subscription.|
| Customer | Add details about the customer who subscribe.|
| CustomerBuyer | Add details about the customer who buy.|
| CustomerBalance | add current customer balance content.|
| Offer | Add details about the offer related to the subscription.|
| Renewal | .|
| Segment | Add details about the related segment.|
| SettingsPayment | Add details about the payment settings related to the customer.|
| UserCreation | Add details about the user who created the ressource.|
| UserUpdate | Add details about the user who last updated the ressource.|
schema.title: SubscriptionExtra
